page_title: I Only Look Like A Pretty Boy, That's All
text:
is the 14th chapter of the 2nd volume and the 41st chapter overall of the Spoof on Titan manga, written and illustrated by hounori.

Overview

 The Cadets take Armin's disguise as Historia too far. 

Summary

The Cadets laugh at Connie who attempts to mimic Historia while dressed similarly as her. Eren critiques his poor attempt at dress-up, so Connie tries to convince him otherwise by believing that stuffing something inside his shirt will elevate his disguise. Jean warns him to stop as Historia herself appears.

Noticing Connie's struggle, Hange remarks that he cannot effectively pull off as Historia undercover, which prompts Armin to suggest that they push forward with their original plan where he takes on the disguise instead. Hange stalls this suggestion and tests to see if the disguise would work on Mikasa, but her well-built physique makes it hard to be secretive. They then propose that Eren test the wig as well, but Armin says that they merely wish to see Eren in the wig for personal entertainment.

Sasha tries it on but the Scouts end up selecting Armin for the disguise. With the plan resting on his and Jean's shoulders, Hange instructs Armin to practice beforehand and crossdress as Historia for a whole day. Armin is against this idea but obeys their orders nonetheless, then complains to Jean about the unnecessary practice who is also dressed as Eren. In the middle of complaining, Armin mistakes Jean for the real Eren and teases him for the uncanny similarity. Jean rages, saying that Armin has broken character by resorting to sarcasm, something that the real Historia would never resort to.

Still in the disguise, Armin meets Historia at the cafeteria and strikes a conversation. As they speak, Mikasa fails to tell the two apart. Sasha says that Armin is the one that would remind her more of Historia.

The day goes by and the Cadets constantly critique Armin's behavior: Mikasa advices that he avoids sticking his elbows out, Sasha notices that he takes bigger steps, and Connie shoves Armin's legs close together while sitting. Moments later, Connie tells Eren that Armin slapped him, but Eren asks if he was certain that the person he talked to was the real Historia or not.

After much practice, Armin masters the disguise and begins to completely act like her. Hange cheers, but Levi, who recently came back from town, assures that the practice was not necessary because the enemy knew little about Historia in the first place. Armin cries at this, but the Scouts note in amazement that even he has mastered crying like a girl.

Outside with Eren and Connie, Armin sobs over Levi's remark. He feels as though he had lost a part of himself, but the two cheer him up and promise to forget about the events earlier that day. Soon afterward, Eren announces that he will go to the bathroom, and Armin and Connie tag along. However, Eren refuses to let Armin join in, with Connie reasoning that he might make them nervous.
